list_info.科目英文名: Selected American Short Stories and Articles

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 美國短篇文選 (Selected American Short Stories and Articles)	開課班級 : 應英三甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
1. To encourage critical understanding and long-lasting readership of diverse literary works. 2. To examine issues related to the environment, society, culture, and identity as they arise in these works. 3. To acquire comparative analysis of the literary works in their cultural and historical contexts. 4. To enhance students’ oral and digital literacy skills through producing video or audio essays based on their readings and reflections.  


2.教學綱要
“Selected English Articles” aims to develop critical reading and analytical skills through examining topics and problems in various articles. The reading list features works by T. C. Boyle, Rachel Carson, Jon Krakauer, Jared Diamond,Lydia Millet, and more. We will learn how to evaluate the authors’ use of language, style, and point of view to communicate their ideas and affect their audiences. We will also create video or audio essays based on our readings and thoughts. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Selected English Articles

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Class Participation and Presentation/Article Reflections: 40%; Mid-term: 30%; Final: 30% 
You will need to interpret and analyze the weekly reading materials.
